inputs.name: scene_packet
inputs.description: Arc stage, scene purpose, target CLS, duration, selected subsystems, and candidate scene parameters.

inputs.name: neighbor_context
inputs.description: Previous and next beat metadata used for parameter unpredictability and continuity checks.

inputs.name: project_evidence
inputs.description: Quotes, transcript excerpts, research notes, project negative space, and approved brand constraints.

derived_features.description: Measures whether the candidate scene is grounded in transcript, project DNA, and subsystem evidence rather than stylistic guesswork.
Classifies the scene as tension, vulnerability, or recognition dominant based on arc role and supporting evidence.
Measures whether raw parameters have been compressed into a coherent Layer-2 directive rather than a loose list of effects.
Calculates whether at least one meaningful parameter expectation is broken relative to the previous beat.

detection_modes.activation_rule: Activate when the scene exists to violate expectation, force a turn, or produce prediction error.
Activate when the scene must expose cost, softness, or emotional nakedness through framing, color, pace, or sound.
Activate when the scene must make the audience feel seen through accurate specificity and culturally precise detail.

laws.name: Saturation Before Generation
laws.purpose: Block scenes that are not grounded in project evidence.

checks.repair_hint: Load transcript evidence, strategy context, and at least one subsystem rationale before composing.

laws.name: Three-Mode Emotional Detection
laws.purpose: Force the scene to name which irreducible trigger it is serving.

checks.repair_hint: Clarify whether the beat is driven by tension, vulnerability, or recognition.

laws.name: Compression, Not Elimination
laws.purpose: Ensure the scene resolves into a small number of dense directives rather than many disconnected settings.

checks.repair_hint: Collapse the candidate into no more than three scene-level directives with explicit trigger intent.

laws.name: Unpredictability Gate
laws.purpose: Require at least one meaningful expectation break relative to adjacent beats.

checks.repair_hint: Change at least one of color temperature, motion profile, pacing, or framing expectation relative to the previous beat.
